title: Enterprise Account Executive
description: A global cybersecurity leader is seeking a seasoned Enterprise AE to drive growth in the APAC region. Based in our Singapore HQ, you will be responsible for closing large deals with Fortune 500 companies.
requirements: 7+ years of enterprise software sales experience
Existing network of C-level contacts in APAC
Strategic thinker with a consultative sales approach
responsibilities: Develop and execute a territory plan for APAC
Lead complex sales cycles involving multiple stakeholders
Work with solution engineers to deliver compelling demos
